question: What is the main difficulty in drawing detailed conclusions from this line chart of sales from 1924 to 2024?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly read the year labels and detect precise changes over time.
options.B: Sales clearly decrease in the middle decades before rising again toward the end.
options.C: The chart shows that sales remain constant throughout the entire period.
options.D: The chart clearly identifies the exact year in which sales reached their maximum.

explanation: The data shows two declines: 1955-1965 and 1975-1985. Small text can make it difficult to see both dips.
